message:
fix: exempt crew and mayor from handoff cooldown

The 2-minute cooldown was designed to prevent tight restart loops for
patrol agents (witness, deacon) that complete quickly on idle rigs.
Crew and mayor hand off on human request, not patrol loops, so the
cooldown just gets in the way.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
